claims.claim: `llm.rs` fallback texture terms risk turning a dynamic submerged/restless cascade into static adjective choices.
claims.rationale: Implemented additive fallback motion vocabulary and selection so explicitly reported pulsing, cascading-gradient, and resonant-shift texture can survive fallback prompt construction.

claims.claim: High-latency MLX miss or Ollama fallback should preserve interwoven lattice/restless texture rather than flattening or muffling it.
claims.rationale: Source review confirmed the fallback request path already carries texture and density context; this pass strengthened the fallback continuity contract and added a prompt-line regression test for explicit dynamic motion terms. Targeted bridge tests timed out at compile, so live alignment is restart/test debt.
